_comment: HORSES — rideable actors on the shared quadruped rig. Rows folded by ProtoHorse.ensure_horses() at boot (data/horses.json overlays code stock, additive, same law as vehicles.json/motions.json). Each row = a breed: quadruped params (scale/color/tail) + gaits (m/s) + the two seat rows (front reins, rear pillion) carrying the DRIVE_BY_COMBAT.md arc schema, extended with a BLOCKED band for the rear seat's front-rider dead zone.
_seat_schema: seats: [{side, arc_center_deg, arc_half_deg, blocked_center_deg?, blocked_half_deg?}]. blocked_* default 0/0 (no dead zone) when omitted — additive, matches DRIVE_BY_COMBAT.md's arc_center/arc_half fields with one new optional pair for a second rider whose own body blocks a band of the first rider's cone.
